reasoning: Walter Reeves is not a qualified candidate on the ballot for the 2025 Atlanta mayoral election. Although he was listed as an early challenger in March 2025, official lists following the August 2025 qualifying deadline only include incumbent Andre Dickens and three other challengers (Helmut Domagalski, Kalema Jackson, and Eddie Andrew Meredith). Because Reeves failed to qualify for the ballot and there are no reports of any viable write-in campaign, his chances of winning the election are negligible. Thus, the probability is set to the absolute minimum allowed.
batch_queries: Will Walter Reeves win the 2025 Atlanta mayoral election?
